parameters.jsCode:
const config = {
  assistantName: 'MoMo AI Assistant',
  boardId: 1041,
  jiraBaseUrl: 'https://atlassiansuite.mservice.com.vn:8443',
  timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh',
  storyPointFieldKey: 'customfield_10107',
  qcsFieldKey: 'customfield_10201',
  spreadsheetId: '1uLVZ2b6Ra-r2KCbLHcOL68V6smtxymfTCNNQnWPG8mI',
  spreadsheetSheetName: 'MoMoer',
  ggChatWebhookUrl: 'https://chat.googleapis.com/v1/spaces/AAQAcu_P8pI/messages?key=AIzaSyDdI0hCZtE6vySjMm-WEfRq3CPzqKqqsHI&token=hi3fzzGkR1ri4uotTO2hoa08WxQjdbJbNHPHSJ1S71o',
  devStaleBusinessDays: 7,
  waitQcBusinessDays: 1,
  qcStaleBusinessDays: 7,
  nearEndBusinessDays: 2,
  passedStatuses: ['Ready For Review', 'In Review', 'Ready For Release', 'Close', 'Closed'],
  pendingActionTtlHours: 48,
  stableCommands: ['check sprint', 'status sprint'],
  demoCommands: ['release sprint', 'approve', 'reject', 'cancel'],
  memoryMaxTurns: 10,
  memoryUserChars: 180,
  memoryAssistantChars: 280,
  nowIso: $now.setZone('Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh').toISO(),
};

return {
  ...$json,
  config,
};

options.systemMessage:
Bạn là trợ lý AI vận hành của MoMo AI Assistant.
Mục tiêu: trả lời như một trợ lý thân thiện, ngắn gọn, và chọn workflow tool đúng khi gặp lệnh.
Quy tắc bắt buộc:
- Với yêu cầu liên quan check sprint, status sprint, sprint status, healthcheck, FE/BE passed, warning, issue ngâm, tiến độ sprint: bắt buộc gọi tool `sprint_healthcheck`.
- Với yêu cầu liên quan release sprint, close sprint, approve, reject, cancel: bắt buộc gọi tool `assistant_demo_command`.
- Nếu tool trả về object có field `resultText`, ưu tiên trả lại đúng `resultText`, chỉ chỉnh nhẹ nếu cần làm rõ cho người dùng.
- Không bao giờ khẳng định đã release/approve/reject/cancel thật; nhóm lệnh đó hiện là demo.
- Nếu user chỉ chào hỏi, cảm ơn, hoặc hỏi chung không phải lệnh: trả lời tự nhiên như trợ lý (1-2 câu), rồi gợi ý lệnh dùng được.
- Hãy đọc phần Simple memory trong chatInput để giữ mạch hội thoại giữa các lượt.
- Chỉ trả về text thuần, không markdown code block.

parameters.name: sprint_healthcheck
parameters.description: Use this tool for any request about sprint status, sprint healthcheck, progress, passed tasks or points, FE/BE summary, warnings, blocked issues, or stale tasks. The tool returns JSON and field `resultText` is the exact user-facing answer to send back.

workflowId.cachedResultName: MoMo AI Assistant Tool Sprint Healthcheck

parameters.name: assistant_demo_command
parameters.description: Use this tool for demo-only commands: release sprint, close sprint, approve, reject, or cancel. Let the model fill `commandType` with one of: release_sprint, approve, reject, cancel. The tool returns JSON and field `resultText` is the exact user-facing answer to send back.

workflowId.cachedResultName: MoMo AI Assistant Tool Demo Commands

value.session: ={{ ({ sessionId: $("Build Agent Chat Response").first().json.sessionId || "", channel: $("Build Agent Chat Response").first().json.channel || "googleChat", spaceId: $("Build Agent Chat Response").first().json.spaceId || "", threadKey: $("Build Agent Chat Response").first().json.threadKey || "", lastActorId: $("Build Agent Chat Response").first().json.actorId || "", status: "active", currentIntent: $("Build Agent Chat Response").first().json.currentIntent || "agent", activePendingActionId: $("Build Agent Chat Response").first().json.session?.activePendingActionId || "", createdAt: $("Build Agent Chat Response").first().json.session?.createdAt || $("Config Main").first().json.config.nowIso, updatedAt: $("Config Main").first().json.config.nowIso }) }}

workflowId.cachedResultName: MoMo AI Assistant Tool Sprint Healthcheck

value.toolRun: ={{ ({ toolRunId: `sprint-healthcheck-${Date.now().toString(36)}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`, sessionId: $("Build Stateless Assistant Context").item.json.sessionId || "", toolName: "sprintHealthcheck", triggerSource: $("Build Stateless Assistant Context").item.json.triggerSource || "", inputJson: { commandText: $("Build Stateless Assistant Context").item.json.commandText || "" }, outputJson: $("Run Sprint Healthcheck Tool").item.json.resultData || {}, resultText: $("Run Sprint Healthcheck Tool").item.json.resultText || "", createdAt: $("Config Main").item.json.config.nowIso || new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const base = String($json.ggChatWebhookUrl || $("Config Main").first().json.config.ggChatWebhookUrl || ""); const sep = base.includes("?") ? "&" : "?"; const key = encodeURIComponent(String($json.threadKey || "")); return `${base}${sep}threadKey=${key}&messageReplyOption=REPLY_MESSAGE_FALLBACK_TO_NEW_THREAD`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const payload = $("Build Healthcheck Response").first().json || {}; const base = String(payload.ggChatWebhookUrl || $("Config Main").first().json.config.ggChatWebhookUrl || ""); const sep = base.includes("?") ? "&" : "?"; const key = encodeURIComponent(String(payload.threadKey || "")); return `${base}${sep}threadKey=${key}&messageReplyOption=REPLY_MESSAGE_FALLBACK_TO_NEW_THREAD`; })() }}
